name: RothC
description: RothC models the turnover of organic carbon in non-waterlogged top-soil. It accounts for the effects of soil texture, temperature, moisture content and plant cover on the turnover process. It uses a monthly time step to calculate total organic carbon (t ha-1), microbial biomass carbon (t ha-1) and d14C (from which the equivalent radiocarbon age of the soil can be calculated).
creator: Model by D.S. Jenkinson and others at Rothamsted Research. PEcAn coupler by Chris Black
